title: Implementation-phase evidence — Iliad-quest workflow contract (implemented to the workshop objections)
what: Records the acceptance-sequence runs and the resolution of all eight Daedalus-workshop objections. The Daedalus workshop STALEMATED twice (needs-work); The Eye adjudicated (2026-07-18) that codex's objections are the implementation spec and authorized implementing to them. Convergence was not reached; The Eye's ruling is the authorization, not the workshop.
why: Honesty: the workshop did not converge. It hardened the requirements through two adversarial stalemates; The Eye ruled to implement to them. The stalemate evidence is preserved (docs/runs/iliad-workflow-contract-1-workshop/round-{1,2}-stalemate/).

workshop_outcome.eye_adjudication: codex's 8 objections accepted as the implementation spec; implement-to-the-objections authorized (2026-07-18)

objection_resolution.resolution: full 40-hex anchors throughout workflow.json; check-workflow verifies every pin resolves
render-workflow.mjs — named destination README.md, deterministic function of workflow.json, --write/--check byte-identical
check-workflow.mjs — local, fail-closed; does NOT touch verify-contracts.mjs/comprehension-gate.mjs
one WHOLLY ADVISORY record; authority-links the existing NORMATIVE iliad invariants (pre-review-before-implementation, post-review-required) instead of restating them
id = sha256:+sha256hex(canonicalize(record minus id)) via merkle-dag/vendor.mjs; check-workflow recomputes and compares

objection_resolution.objection: checker does not discriminate wrong stage metadata
objection_resolution.resolution: check-workflow holds an EXPLICIT canonical 7-stage table (order, stage, owner path, linked-invariant, advisory) and validates each stage EXACTLY — a swapped invariant link or wrong module fails

comprehension-queries.json with 4 pinned authority-anchored queries; fixtures/ has a pass + 3 negatives EACH flipping exactly one answer, proving the TARGETED misconception (bookend / enforced / proximity) causes the denial
render-workflow.mjs writes ONLY ./README.md; --check is read-only and byte-identical

runs.result: id recomputes; canonical 7-stage table exact; all pins resolve; linked invariants present; ADVISORY; README projection equal

runs.step: comprehension gate — negatives (each proves its targeted misconception denies)

runs.result: 215/215 — the ADVISORY addition disturbs no existing normative contract

non_claim: This proves structural integrity, content-addressing (incl. id recompute), provenance linkage, projection equality, and no-disturbance. It does NOT prove the stage order is optimal. The workshop did NOT converge; The Eye's implement-to-the-objections ruling is the authorization. Submitted for The Eye's acceptance.
change_rule: Regenerated whenever the workflow record or tooling changes; every listed command must still produce the listed exit status.
